event_world_42_20260423_084956_0000.name: Ancient Civilizations Exhibition
event_world_42_20260423_084956_0000.description: A stunning collection of artefacts on loan from the British Museum and the Louvre traces humanity's earliest cities — from Mesopotamia to the Indus Valley.

reviews.text: Parking chaos added two hours to our evening and the toilet facilities were disgraceful.

event_world_42_20260423_084956_0004.name: Electronic Beats Festival
event_world_42_20260423_084956_0004.description: Three stages, twelve DJs, and a laser show that runs all night. Top acts from Berlin's underground scene headline this pulse-pounding electronic showcase.

reviews.text: Electric atmosphere from start to finish — the performance was world-class.

Intimate venue setting meant even the cheap tickets gave a brilliant view of the stage.
